debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
c d : α
h1 h2 : Hom c d
h : h1 ≠ h2
⊢ @CategoryInContext.NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c α C c d h1 ≠ @CategoryInContext.NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c α C c d h2

proof:
intro H
  apply h
  have eq := congr_arg (fun η => η.arrow d (Category.id d)) H
  simp only [NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c, comp_id] at eq
  exact eq

  have := congr_fun (congr_fun (congr_arg NaturalTransformation.arrow H) d) (id d)

  rwa [comp_id, comp_id] at this

  exact this
